---
title: "Running Results"
author: "Bruno Sullivan"
date: "2025-12-05"
output: html_document
---
##Creation of Sectoral Portfolios##
```{r}
library(dplyr)


#call our compiled database#

df3 <- combined_data

sector_daily <- df3 %>%
  group_by(sector, date) %>%
  summarise(
    RET_eq  = mean(RET,       na.rm = TRUE),  
    PS_eq   = mean(parspread, na.rm = TRUE), 
    n_firms = n_distinct(ticker),
    .groups = "drop"
)

library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

##create correlation matrix so we can take portfolio variance##

sector_corr <- df3 %>%
  dplyr::select(sector, date, ticker, RET) %>%
  group_by(sector) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    wide <- .x %>%
      dplyr::select(date, ticker, RET) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = ticker, values_from = RET) %>%
      arrange(date)

  
    R_mat <- as.matrix(wide[ , -1, drop = FALSE])

    rho  <- cor(R_mat, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

    tibble(cor_mat = list(rho))
  }) %>%
  ungroup()


sector_iv <- df3 %>%
  dplyr::select(sector, date, ticker, impl_volatility) %>%

  left_join(sector_corr, by = "sector") %>%
  group_by(sector, date) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
   
    sigma <- .x$impl_volatility
    names(sigma) <- .x$ticker


    rho <- .x$cor_mat[[1]]

 
    common_tickers <- intersect(names(sigma), colnames(rho))
    sigma <- sigma[common_tickers]
    rho   <- rho[common_tickers, common_tickers, drop = FALSE]

    n <- length(sigma)
    if (n <= 1L || any(is.na(sigma))) {

      return(tibble(sector_iv = NA_real_))
    }


    Sigma_impl <- (sigma %o% sigma) * rho


    w <- rep(1 / n, n)

    sigma2_P <- as.numeric(t(w) %*% Sigma_impl %*% w)
    tibble(sector_iv = sqrt(sigma2_P))
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

##SECTOR database##
sector_panel <- sector_daily %>%
  left_join(sector_iv, by = c("sector", "date"))
```

##TVAR model sectoral###
```{r}
library(dplyr)

epu_daily <- df3[, c("date", "daily_policy_index")]
epu_daily <- unique(epu_daily)

sector_panel$EPU <- epu_daily$daily_policy_index[
  match(sector_panel$date, epu_daily$date)
]

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tsDyn)

sectors <- unique(sector_panel$sector)
sector_models <- list()

###loop through each sector#
for (sec in sectors) {

  ##taking diff of variables, returns is alr a difference##

  df_s <- sector_panel %>%
    filter(sector == sec) %>%
    arrange(date) %>%
    mutate(
      d_cds = PS_eq     - lag(PS_eq),
      d_vol = sector_iv - lag(sector_iv),
      ret   = RET_eq
    ) %>%
    drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)


  Y <- as.matrix(df_s[, c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")])


  th <- df_s$EPU

  model_sec <- tsDyn::TVAR(
    data    = Y,
    lag     = 2,
    nthresh = 1,
    thDelay = 1,
    trim    = 0.15,
    thVar   = th,
    model   = "TAR"
  )

  sector_models[[sec]] <- model_sec
}


library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

threshold_table <- tibble(
  Sector     = names(sector_models),
  Threshold  = sapply(sector_models, \(m) m$model.specific$Thresh)
)

threshold_table
```



###Wald Test###

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(vars)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)

var_names <- c("d_cds", "ret", "d_vol")

run_regime_granger_for_sector <- function(sec, sector_panel, sector_models, p = 2) {

  ##same as above##

  df_s <- sector_panel %>%
    filter(sector == sec) %>%
    arrange(date) %>%
    mutate(
      d_cds = PS_eq     - lag(PS_eq),
      d_vol = sector_iv - lag(sector_iv),
      ret   = RET_eq
    ) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)

  mod_sec    <- sector_models[[sec]]
  regime_vec <- mod_sec$model.specific$regime

  stopifnot(length(regime_vec) == nrow(df_s))


  df_reg <- df_s
  df_reg$regime <- regime_vec

  df_reg <- df_reg[, c("date", var_names, "EPU", "regime")]


  df_reg <- df_reg[complete.cases(df_reg[, c(var_names, "regime")]), , drop = FALSE]
##splitting regime##


  df_low  <- df_reg[df_reg$regime == 1, var_names, drop = FALSE]
  df_high <- df_reg[df_reg$regime == 2, var_names, drop = FALSE]


  df_low  <- df_low[complete.cases(df_low),  , drop = FALSE]
  df_high <- df_high[complete.cases(df_high), , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(df_low) <= p || nrow(df_high) <= p) {
    return(
      tibble(
        sector    = sec,
        direction = c("VOL → CDS", "RET → CDS", "CDS → VOL"),
        p_low     = NA_real_,
        p_high    = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }


  var_low  <- VAR(df_low,  p = p, type = "const")
  var_high <- VAR(df_high, p = p, type = "const")




  p_low_VtoCDS  <- causality(var_low,  cause = "d_vol")$Granger$p.value
  p_high_VtoCDS <- causality(var_high, cause = "d_vol")$Granger$p.value


  p_low_RtoCDS  <- causality(var_low,  cause = "ret")$Granger$p.value
  p_high_RtoCDS <- causality(var_high, cause = "ret")$Granger$p.value


  p_low_CDStoV  <- causality(var_low,  cause = "d_cds")$Granger$p.value
  p_high_CDStoV <- causality(var_high, cause = "d_cds")$Granger$p.value

  tibble(
    sector    = sec,
    direction = c("VOL → CDS", "RET → CDS", "CDS → VOL"),
    p_low     = c(p_low_VtoCDS,  p_low_RtoCDS,  p_low_CDStoV),
    p_high    = c(p_high_VtoCDS, p_high_RtoCDS, p_high_CDStoV)
  )
}


sectors <- names(sector_models)

granger_sector_results <- purrr::map_dfr(
  sectors,
  ~ run_regime_granger_for_sector(.x, sector_panel, sector_models, p = 2)
)

granger_sector_results

add_stars <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)      ~ "",
    p < 0.01      ~ "***",
    p < 0.05      ~ "**",
    p < 0.10      ~ "*",
    TRUE          ~ ""
  )
}

granger_sector_results2 <- granger_sector_results %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    direction_code = dplyr::case_when(
      direction == "VOL: CDS" ~ "V:CDS",
      direction == "RET: CDS" ~ "RET:CDS",
      direction == "CDS: VOL" ~ "CDS:V",
      TRUE ~ direction  
    )
  )

granger_sector_results2 <- granger_sector_results2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    p_low_str  = ifelse(is.na(p_low),
                        NA_character_,
                        paste0(round(p_low, 3), add_stars(p_low))),
    p_high_str = ifelse(is.na(p_high),
                        NA_character_,
                        paste0(round(p_high, 3), add_stars(p_high)))
  )

table_wide <- granger_sector_results2 %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols = sector,
    names_from  = direction_code,
    values_from = c(p_low_str, p_high_str),
    names_glue  = "{direction_code}_{.value}"
  )

```


###Daily EPU data chart###

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(df_tvar, aes(x = Date, y = EPU)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Daily EPU", y = "EPU Index", x = "Date")

```

##overall portfolio###
```{r}

df_notele <- df3 %>%
  filter(sector != "Telecommunication Services")
###dropped telecom not enough obs##

market_daily <- df_notele %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(
    RET_eq  = mean(RET,       na.rm = TRUE),  
    PS_eq   = mean(parspread, na.rm = TRUE), 
    n_firms = n_distinct(ticker),
    .groups = "drop"
)

##same building of portfolio variance##

ret_wide <- df3 %>%
  dplyr::select(date, ticker, RET) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = ticker, values_from = RET) %>%
  arrange(date)

R_mat_all <- as.matrix(ret_wide[, -1, drop = FALSE])  # drop date
rho_all   <- cor(R_mat_all, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")



market_iv <- df3 %>%
  dplyr::select(date, ticker, impl_volatility) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    sigma <- .x$impl_volatility
    names(sigma) <- .x$ticker

 
    common <- intersect(names(sigma), colnames(rho_all))
    sigma  <- sigma[common]
    rho    <- rho_all[common, common, drop = FALSE]

    n <- length(sigma)
    if (n <= 1L || any(is.na(sigma))) {
      return(tibble(port_iv = NA_real_))
    }


    Sigma_impl <- (sigma %o% sigma) * rho

  
    w <- rep(1 / n, n)
    sigma2_P <- as.numeric(t(w) %*% Sigma_impl %*% w)

    tibble(port_iv = sqrt(sigma2_P))
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

epu_daily <- df3[, c("date", "daily_policy_index")] %>%
  distinct()
##make sure is merged w EPU and has right dates#
market_panel <- market_daily %>%
  left_join(market_iv, by = "date") %>%
  mutate(
    EPU = epu_daily$daily_policy_index[
      match(date, epu_daily$date)
    ]
  ) %>%
  filter(
    date >= as.Date("2017-01-01"),
    date <= as.Date("2023-12-31")
  )
```


###TVAR on entire market

```{r}
df_m <- market_panel %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(
    d_cds = PS_eq  - lag(PS_eq),
    d_vol = port_iv - lag(port_iv),
    ret   = RET_eq
  ) %>%
  drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)

Y  <- as.matrix(df_m[, c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")])
th <- df_m$EPU


tvar_market <- TVAR(
  data    = Y,
  lag     = 2,
  nthresh = 1,
  thDelay = 1,
  trim    = 0.15,   
  thVar   = th,
  model   = "TAR"
)

tvar_market


market_df <- market_panel %>%       
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(
    d_cds = PS_eq     - lag(PS_eq),
    d_vol = port_iv - lag(port_iv),  
    ret   = RET_eq
  ) %>%
  drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)

var_names <- c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")
p_lag     <- 2


Y_market <- as.matrix(market_df[, var_names])

tvar_market <- tsDyn::TVAR(
  data    = Y_market,
  lag     = p_lag,
  nthresh = 1,
  thDelay = 1,
  trim    = 0.15,
  thVar   = market_df$EPU,
  model   = "TAR"
)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(vars)
library(tsDyn)
library(tibble)


market_df <- market_panel %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(
    d_cds = PS_eq   - lag(PS_eq),
    d_vol = port_iv - lag(port_iv),
    ret   = RET_eq
  ) %>%
  drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)

var_names <- c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")
p_lag     <- 2


Y_market <- as.matrix(market_df[, var_names])

tvar_market <- TVAR(
  data    = Y_market,
  lag     = p_lag,
  nthresh = 1,
  thDelay = 1,
  trim    = 0.15,
  thVar   = market_df$EPU,
  model   = "TAR"
)


regime_vec <- tvar_market$model.specific$regime
stopifnot(length(regime_vec) == nrow(market_df))

df_reg <- market_df %>%
  mutate(regime = regime_vec) %>%
  dplyr::select(date, all_of(var_names), EPU, regime) %>%
  drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, regime)

df_low  <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 1) %>% dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()
df_high <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 2) %>% dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()

N_low  <- nrow(df_low)
N_high <- nrow(df_high)

if (N_low <= p_lag | N_high <= p_lag) stop("Not enough obs in one regime for VAR.")


var_low  <- VAR(df_low,  p = p_lag, type = "const")
var_high <- VAR(df_high, p = p_lag, type = "const")



wald_results <- tibble::tibble(
  direction = c("d_vol → d_cds", "ret → d_cds", "d_cds → d_vol"),


  p_low = c(
    vars::causality(var_low,  cause = "d_vol")$Granger$p.value,
    vars::causality(var_low,  cause = "ret")   $Granger$p.value,
    vars::causality(var_low,  cause = "d_cds") $Granger$p.value
  ),


  p_high = c(
    vars::causality(var_high, cause = "d_vol")$Granger$p.value,
    vars::causality(var_high, cause = "ret")   $Granger$p.value,
    vars::causality(var_high, cause = "d_cds") $Granger$p.value
  )
)

wald_results

###make our output table###


add_stars <- function(p) {
  case_when(
    is.na(p) ~ "",
    p < 0.01 ~ "***",
    p < 0.05 ~ "**",
    p < 0.10 ~ "*",
    TRUE     ~ ""
  )
}

tidy_var <- function(var_model) {
  res_list <- var_model$varresult
  bind_rows(lapply(names(res_list), function(eq) {
    sm    <- summary(res_list[[eq]])
    coefs <- coef(sm)   # Estimate, Std. Error, t value, Pr(>|t|)
    tibble(
      equation = eq,
      term     = rownames(coefs),
      estimate = coefs[, "Estimate"],
      p_value  = coefs[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
    )
  }))
}

desired_terms <- c(
  "(Intercept)",
  "d_cds.l1", "d_vol.l1", "ret.l1",
  "d_cds.l2", "d_vol.l2", "ret.l2"
)

format_var_table <- function(var_model) {
  tidy_var(var_model) %>%
    filter(term %in% desired_terms) %>%
    mutate(
      term    = factor(term, levels = desired_terms),
      est_str = sprintf("%.4f%s", round(estimate, 4), add_stars(p_value))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(equation, term, est_str) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_str) %>%
    arrange(equation)
}

market_low_tab  <- format_var_table(var_low)
market_high_tab <- format_var_table(var_high)

library(flextable)
 library(officer)
 doc <- read_docx()
 doc <- body_add_par(doc,
   value = sprintf("Market – Low EPU (N = %d)", N_low), style = "heading 2")
 doc <- body_add_flextable(doc, flextable(market_low_tab))
 doc <- body_add_par(doc, value = "", style = "Normal")
 doc <- body_add_par(doc,
   value = sprintf("Market – High EPU (N = %d)", N_high), style = "heading 2")
 doc <- body_add_flextable(doc, flextable(market_high_tab))
 doc <- body_add_par(doc, value = "", style = "Normal")
 print(doc, target = "10market_TVAR_VARcoeffs.docx")

```



#market joint portmanteau test###
```{r}
library(vars)
lag_pt <- 10   

pt_low  <- serial.test(var_low,  lags.pt = lag_pt, type = "PT.asymptotic")
pt_high <- serial.test(var_high, lags.pt = lag_pt, type = "PT.asymptotic")

joint_portmanteau_market <- tibble::tibble(
  regime  = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
  N       = c(N_low, N_high),
  p_value = c(
    pt_low$serial$p.value,
    pt_high$serial$p.value
  )
) 

joint_portmanteau_market

```


#creation of robustness check table#
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(vars)
library(tsDyn)
library(tibble)
library(flextable)
library(officer)

var_names <- c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")
p_lag     <- 2



market_df <- market_panel %>%
  dplyr::arrange(date) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    d_cds = PS_eq   - dplyr::lag(PS_eq),
    d_vol = port_iv - dplyr::lag(port_iv),
    ret   = RET_eq
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)


add_stars <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p) ~ "",
    p < 0.01 ~ "***",
    p < 0.05 ~ "**",
    p < 0.10 ~ "*",
    TRUE     ~ ""
  )
}

tidy_var <- function(v) {
  res_list <- v$varresult
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(names(res_list), function(eq) {
    sm    <- summary(res_list[[eq]])
    coefs <- coef(sm)
    tibble::tibble(
      equation = eq,
      term     = rownames(coefs),
      estimate = coefs[, "Estimate"],
      p_value  = coefs[, "Pr(>|t|)"]
    )
  }))
}

desired_terms <- c(
  "(Intercept)",
  "d_cds.l1", "d_vol.l1", "ret.l1",
  "d_cds.l2", "d_vol.l2", "ret.l2"
)

format_var_table <- function(v) {
  tidy_var(v) %>%
    dplyr::filter(term %in% desired_terms) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      term    = factor(term, levels = desired_terms),
      est_str = sprintf("%.4f%s", round(estimate, 4), add_stars(p_value))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(equation, term, est_str) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = term, values_from = est_str) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(equation)
}


run_market_tvar_tables <- function(trim_val) {

  Y_market <- as.matrix(market_df[, var_names])

  tvar_market <- tsDyn::TVAR(
    data    = Y_market,
    lag     = p_lag,
    nthresh = 1,
    thDelay = 1,
    trim    = trim_val,
    thVar   = market_df$EPU,
    model   = "TAR"
  )

  tau        <- as.numeric(tvar_market$model.specific$Thresh)
  regime_vec <- tvar_market$model.specific$regime
  stopifnot(length(regime_vec) == nrow(market_df))

  df_reg <- market_df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(regime = regime_vec) %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(var_names), regime)

  df_low <- df_reg %>%
    dplyr::filter(regime == 1L) %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(var_names)) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()

  df_high <- df_reg %>%
    dplyr::filter(regime == 2L) %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(var_names)) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na()

  N_low  <- nrow(df_low)
  N_high <- nrow(df_high)

  if (N_low <= p_lag | N_high <= p_lag)
    stop(sprintf("Not enough obs in one regime for VAR at trim = %.2f", trim_val))

  var_low  <- vars::VAR(df_low,  p = p_lag, type = "const")
  var_high <- vars::VAR(df_high, p = p_lag, type = "const")

  list(
    trim      = trim_val,
    threshold = tau,
    N_low     = N_low,
    N_high    = N_high,
    low_tab   = format_var_table(var_low),
    high_tab  = format_var_table(var_high)
  )
}


###loop and run the tvar w our diff trim values##

trims   <- c(0.10, 0.15, 0.20)
results <- lapply(trims, run_market_tvar_tables)

doc <- officer::read_docx()

for (res in results) {

  doc <- officer::body_add_par(
    doc,
    value = sprintf("TVAR Market Coefficients (trim = %.2f, τ = %.2f)",
                    res$trim, res$threshold),
    style = "heading 1"
  )

  doc <- officer::body_add_par(
    doc,
    value = sprintf("Market – Low EPU (N = %d)", res$N_low),
    style = "heading 2"
  )

  doc <- flextable::body_add_flextable(
    x   = doc,
    value = flextable::flextable(res$low_tab)
  )

  doc <- officer::body_add_par(doc, value = "", style = "Normal")

  doc <- officer::body_add_par(
    doc,
    value = sprintf("Market – High EPU (N = %d)", res$N_high),
    style = "heading 2"
  )

  doc <- flextable::body_add_flextable(
    x   = doc,
    value = flextable::flextable(res$high_tab)
  )

  doc <- officer::body_add_par(doc, value = "", style = "Normal")
}

print(doc, target = "market_TVAR_VARcoeffs_all_trims.docx")

```



###Eigenvalue modulus test###
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(vars)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)

var_names <- c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")
p_lag     <- 2


run_regime_stability_for_sector <- function(sec, sector_panel, sector_models, p = p_lag) {

  df_s <- sector_panel %>%
    filter(sector == sec) %>%
    arrange(date) %>%
    mutate(
      d_cds = PS_eq     - lag(PS_eq),
      d_vol = sector_iv - lag(sector_iv),
      ret   = RET_eq
    ) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)

  mod_sec    <- sector_models[[sec]]
  regime_vec <- mod_sec$model.specific$regime
  stopifnot(length(regime_vec) == nrow(df_s))

  df_reg <- df_s
  df_reg$regime <- regime_vec
  df_reg <- df_reg[, c("date", var_names, "EPU", "regime")]
  df_reg <- df_reg[complete.cases(df_reg[, c(var_names, "regime")]), , drop = FALSE]

  # split by regime
  df_low  <- df_reg[df_reg$regime == 1, var_names, drop = FALSE]
  df_high <- df_reg[df_reg$regime == 2, var_names, drop = FALSE]

  df_low  <- df_low[complete.cases(df_low),  , drop = FALSE]
  df_high <- df_high[complete.cases(df_high), , drop = FALSE]

  n_low  <- nrow(df_low)
  n_high <- nrow(df_high)

  if (n_low <= p || n_high <= p) {
    return(
      tibble(
        sector     = sec,
        regime     = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
        n_obs      = c(n_low, n_high),
        max_mod    = NA_real_,
        stable_VAR = NA
      )
    )
  }


  var_low  <- VAR(df_low,  p = p, type = "const")
  var_high <- VAR(df_high, p = p, type = "const")


  eig_low  <- roots(var_low,  modulus = TRUE)
  eig_high <- roots(var_high, modulus = TRUE)


  tibble(
    sector     = sec,
    regime     = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
    n_obs      = c(n_low, n_high),
    max_mod    = c(max(eig_low), max(eig_high)),
    stable_VAR = c(all(eig_low  < 1), all(eig_high < 1))
  )
}



sectors_use <- names(sector_models)   

stability_results <- map_dfr(
  sectors_use,
  ~ run_regime_stability_for_sector(.x, sector_panel, sector_models, p = p_lag)
)

stability_results


```



#joint portmanteau but on all sectors###
```{r}

library(tidyr)
library(vars)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)

var_names <- c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")
p_lag     <- 2     
lag_pt    <- 10    # Portmanteau test lag not tvar

run_joint_portmanteau_sector <- function(sec,
                                         sector_panel,
                                         sector_models,
                                         p      = p_lag,
                                         lag_pt = lag_pt) {


  df_s <- sector_panel %>%
    filter(sector == sec) %>%
    arrange(date) %>%
    mutate(
      d_cds = PS_eq     - lag(PS_eq),
      d_vol = sector_iv - lag(sector_iv),
      ret   = RET_eq
    ) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)


  mod_sec    <- sector_models[[sec]]
  regime_vec <- mod_sec$model.specific$regime
  stopifnot(length(regime_vec) == nrow(df_s))

  df_reg <- df_s %>%
    mutate(regime = regime_vec) %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(var_names), regime)

  df_low  <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 1L) %>% dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()
  df_high <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 2L) %>% dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()

  N_low  <- nrow(df_low)
  N_high <- nrow(df_high)


  if (N_low <= p || N_high <= p) {
    return(
      tibble(
        sector = sec,
        regime = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
        N      = c(N_low, N_high),
        p_value = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }


  var_low  <- VAR(df_low,  p = p, type = "const")
  var_high <- VAR(df_high, p = p, type = "const")


  pt_low  <- serial.test(var_low,  lags.pt = lag_pt, type = "PT.asymptotic")
  pt_high <- serial.test(var_high, lags.pt = lag_pt, type = "PT.asymptotic")

  tibble(
    sector  = sec,
    regime  = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
    N       = c(N_low, N_high),
    p_value = c(pt_low$serial$p.value,
                pt_high$serial$p.value)
  )
}


sectors_use <- setdiff(names(sector_models), "Telecommunications Services")

joint_portmanteau_results <- purrr::map_dfr(
  sectors_use,
  ~ run_joint_portmanteau_sector(.x, sector_panel, sector_models,
                                 p = p_lag, lag_pt = 10)
)

joint_portmanteau_results
```

###Wald Test and Significance Plot for our sectors###
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(vars)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)

var_names <- c("d_cds", "ret", "d_vol")

run_regime_granger_for_sector <- function(sec, sector_panel, sector_models, p = 2) {

  df_s <- sector_panel %>%
    filter(sector == sec) %>%
    arrange(date) %>%
    mutate(
      d_cds = PS_eq     - lag(PS_eq),
      d_vol = sector_iv - lag(sector_iv),
      ret   = RET_eq
    ) %>%
    tidyr::drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)

  mod_sec    <- sector_models[[sec]]
  regime_vec <- mod_sec$model.specific$regime

  stopifnot(length(regime_vec) == nrow(df_s))


  df_reg <- df_s
  df_reg$regime <- regime_vec

  df_reg <- df_reg[, c("date", var_names, "EPU", "regime")]

 
  df_reg <- df_reg[complete.cases(df_reg[, c(var_names, "regime")]), , drop = FALSE]


  df_low  <- df_reg[df_reg$regime == 1, var_names, drop = FALSE]
  df_high <- df_reg[df_reg$regime == 2, var_names, drop = FALSE]


  df_low  <- df_low[complete.cases(df_low),  , drop = FALSE]
  df_high <- df_high[complete.cases(df_high), , drop = FALSE]


  if (nrow(df_low) <= p || nrow(df_high) <= p) {
    return(
      tibble(
        sector    = sec,
        direction = c("VOL → CDS", "RET → CDS", "CDS → VOL"),
        p_low     = NA_real_,
        p_high    = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }


  var_low  <- VAR(df_low,  p = p, type = "const")
  var_high <- VAR(df_high, p = p, type = "const")


  p_low_VtoCDS  <- causality(var_low,  cause = "d_vol")$Granger$p.value
  p_high_VtoCDS <- causality(var_high, cause = "d_vol")$Granger$p.value


  p_low_RtoCDS  <- causality(var_low,  cause = "ret")$Granger$p.value
  p_high_RtoCDS <- causality(var_high, cause = "ret")$Granger$p.value


  p_low_CDStoV  <- causality(var_low,  cause = "d_cds")$Granger$p.value
  p_high_CDStoV <- causality(var_high, cause = "d_cds")$Granger$p.value

  tibble(
    sector    = sec,
    direction = c("VOL → CDS", "RET → CDS", "CDS → VOL"),
    p_low     = c(p_low_VtoCDS,  p_low_RtoCDS,  p_low_CDStoV),
    p_high    = c(p_high_VtoCDS, p_high_RtoCDS, p_high_CDStoV)
  )
}


sectors <- names(sector_models)

granger_sector_results <- purrr::map_dfr(
  sectors,
  ~ run_regime_granger_for_sector(.x, sector_panel, sector_models, p = 2)
)

granger_sector_results <- granger_sector_results %>%
  filter(sector != "Telecommunications Services")


granger_sector_results




add_stars <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)      ~ "",
    p < 0.01      ~ "***",
    p < 0.05      ~ "**",
    p < 0.10      ~ "*",
    TRUE          ~ ""
  )
}

granger_sector_table <- granger_sector_results %>%

  dplyr::mutate(
    direction_code = dplyr::case_when(
      direction == "VOL → CDS" ~ "VtoCDS",
      direction == "RET → CDS" ~ "RETtoCDS",
      direction == "CDS → VOL" ~ "CDStoV",
      TRUE ~ direction
    ),
    
    p_low_star  = dplyr::if_else(
      is.na(p_low),
      NA_character_,
      sprintf("%.3f%s", round(p_low, 3),  add_stars(p_low))
    ),
    p_high_star = dplyr::if_else(
      is.na(p_high),
      NA_character_,
      sprintf("%.3f%s", round(p_high, 3), add_stars(p_high))
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(sector, direction_code, p_low_star, p_high_star) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols    = sector,
    names_from = direction_code,
    values_from = c(p_low_star, p_high_star),
    names_glue = "{direction_code}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  # optional: reorder columns
  dplyr::select(
    sector,
    VtoCDS_p_low_star,  VtoCDS_p_high_star,
    RETtoCDS_p_low_star, RETtoCDS_p_high_star,
    CDStoV_p_low_star,  CDStoV_p_high_star
  )

granger_sector_table

plot_df <- granger_sector_results %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = c(p_low, p_high),
    names_to  = "regime",
    values_to = "p_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    regime = dplyr::recode(
      regime,
      "p_low"  = "Low EPU regime",
      "p_high" = "High EPU regime"
    ),
    stars  = add_stars(p_value),
    neg_log_p = ifelse(is.na(p_value) | p_value <= 0,
                       NA_real_,
                       -log10(p_value))
  )

sig_summary <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(sig_10 = !is.na(p_value) & p_value < 0.05) %>%
  group_by(regime, direction) %>%
  summarise(
    n_sectors      = n_distinct(sector),
    n_sig          = sum(sig_10),
    frac_sig       = n_sig / n_sectors,
    .groups = "drop"
  )


##plot share of sig firms##
ggplot(sig_summary, aes(x = direction, y = frac_sig, fill = regime)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Low EPU regime"  = "#1B1B1B", 
      "High EPU regime" = "#1F4E89"  
    )
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Direction of Granger Causality",
    y = "Share of Sectors with p value < 0.05",
    title = "Share of Sectors with significant directional relationship",
    fill = "Regime"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```
##building sum stats for report##
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)


sum_stat <- df3 %>%
  dplyr::select(ticker, sector, diff_parspread, RET, diff_impvol, daily_policy_index) %>%
  drop_na()
sum_stat <- df3 %>%
  dplyr::filter(sector != "Telecommunications") %>%
  dplyr::select(ticker, sector, diff_parspread, RET, diff_impvol, daily_policy_index) %>%
  drop_na()

summary_stats <- sum_stat %>%
  dplyr::select(diff_parspread, RET, diff_impvol, daily_policy_index) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything()) %>%
  group_by(name) %>%
  summarise(
    N    = n(),
    Mean = mean(value),
    SD   = sd(value),
    Min  = min(value),
    Max  = max(value)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = dplyr::recode(name,
      diff_parspread       = "Δ CDS Spread",
      RET                  = "Stock Returns",
      diff_impvol          = "Δ Implied Volatility",
      daily_policy_index  = "Policy Uncertainty (EPU)"
    ),
    Mean = number(Mean, accuracy = 0.00001),
    SD   = number(SD,   accuracy = 0.00001),
    Min  = number(Min,  accuracy = 0.00001),
    Max  = number(Max,  accuracy = 0.00001)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Variable, N, Mean, SD, Min, Max)

library(officer)
library(flextable)


doc_summ <- read_docx()


doc_summ <- body_add_par(doc_summ,
                         value = "Summary Statistics",
                         style = "heading 2")


doc_summ <- body_add_flextable(doc_summ, flextable(summary_stats))


print(doc_summ, target = "summary_stats.docx")

```


###EPU graph###

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)


epu_raw <- read.csv("~/Documents/Eco475/EPU_data_ext.csv")


epu_dail <- epu_raw %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-%02d", year, month, day))
  ) %>%
  filter(year < 2024)


ggplot(epu_dail, aes(x = date, y = daily_policy_index)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Economic Policy Uncertainty (Daily, 2017–2023)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "EPU Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)



thr <- 197.2   

epu_dail <- epu_dail %>%
  mutate(
    color_flag = ifelse(daily_policy_index < thr, "Below", "Above")
  )

ggplot(epu_dail, aes(x = date, y = daily_policy_index)) +
  geom_line(
    aes(color = color_flag, group = 1),  
    linewidth = 0.35
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = thr,
    color = "red",
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Below" = "darkblue", "Above" = "black"),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Economic Policy Uncertainty with TVAR Threshold (2017-2023)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "EPU Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)


```
